summary: NT Commerce 12.0 - P1 Performance Improvements Testing (Iteration 76). All 28 tests passed (100%). Features verified: Pagination on all list endpoints, Strong password validation with Arabic errors, Redis cache integration for stats dashboard, N+1 query fix for customers/suppliers, All regression tests passing.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Pagination utility correctly limits max per_page to 100 (pagination.py:17)
✅ Password validation returns Arabic error messages (password_validator.py:20-28)
✅ Redis cache service has graceful fallback when unavailable (cache_service.py:27-28)
✅ N+1 fix uses batch fetch pattern in customers_routes.py:64-68
✅ N+1 fix uses batch fetch pattern in suppliers_core_routes.py:52-56
✅ Cache endpoints properly protected by get_super_admin (main.py:991-1003)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 tested all P1 performance improvements. All 28 tests passed: 9 pagination tests, 5 password validation tests, 4 cache management tests, 4 N+1 fix tests, 6 regression tests.

pagination_endpoints.products_paginated: PASS - Returns items, total, page, page_size, total_pages

password_validation.weak_password_123: PASS - Returns 400 with Arabic validation errors
password_validation.password_update_validation: PASS - Weak passwords rejected on update too

cache_management.cache_stats_endpoint: PASS - Returns available:true, hits, misses, keys
cache_management.stats_caching_behavior: PASS - Stats endpoint returns cached data

n1_query_fix.customers_family_name: PASS - All customers have family_name field
n1_query_fix.suppliers_family_name: PASS - All suppliers have family_name field

performance_improvements_summary.pagination: All 9 list endpoints now support pagination with configurable page_size (max 100)
performance_improvements_summary.n1_query_fix: Customers and suppliers use batch fetch pattern instead of N+1 queries
performance_improvements_summary.redis_cache: Stats dashboard cached for 60 seconds, cache management endpoints for admin
performance_improvements_summary.password_validation: Strong password rules: min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char
